Calculation.Text: JSONFormatElements ( JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["id" ; Case ( PrimaryKey Override = ""; Case ( OriginalKey = "" ; PrimaryKey ; OriginalKey ); PrimaryKey Override ) ; JSONString ] ; ["value" ; Text ; JSONString ]; ["parent" ; JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["type" ; Source item type ; JSONString];["id" ; Parent id ; JSONString]); JSONObject ]; ["package_id" ; Package id; JSONString ]; ["package_name" ; FAT Package @ Text::JSON Friendly id; JSONString]; ["usage_type" ; FAT Package @ Text::Usage type name; JSONString ] //["parent" ; "{\"type\": \"" & Source item type & "\"},{\"id\": \"" & Parent id & "\"}"; JSONObject ] ) ) /* If the textfield is created by cloning a Title and is global - it should be exported with the Old PrimaryKey from clone. If the textfield is created in a translation process - it should be exported with the Orginal Key */
